S.text: Glaucoma follow-up for primary open-angle glaucoma OU, on latanoprost since last visit.
Reports full adherence: latanoprost one drop qHS OU nightly, no missed doses.
Transient redness first week that resolved; denies vision changes or new symptoms.
Notes mild lash lengthening (known cosmetic prostaglandin effect); no periocular skin change.

O.text: IOP 17 mmHg OD / 18 mmHg OS (GAT); pretreatment baseline 26 mmHg OD / 27 mmHg OS.
Optic nerves: C/D 0.65 OU, stable vs baseline photos, rims intact, no new disc hemorrhage.
HVF 24-2 stable: mean deviation essentially unchanged vs prior field 6 months ago, no new or deepening defects.
OCT RNFL stable, no progressive thinning vs prior scan.

A.text: Primary open-angle glaucoma OU, stable and at target IOP on latanoprost.

P.text: Continue latanoprost one drop qHS OU, no change; reinforce adherence.
RTC 4 months for IOP check; repeat HVF and OCT RNFL at next annual visit.
